decision_authority: ADR-0011 master-orchestrator delegation approved by product owner

limited_experimental_go.required_publication: publish all denominators, per-rule support, abstentions, limitations, and correction ledger

automatic_no_go: any default free-core report changes when --pack is not selected
any network or model call in the pack scan path
any finding without a resolvable repository-relative evidence pointer
any general hallucination-rate, universal safety, or complete-framework claim
any untouched-cohort result inspected before detector and artifact freeze
precision below 0.80 or finding recall below 0.65 on eligible adjudicated untouched items
